# EOLOS DESIGN LAB , Ellada

> To EOLOS DESIGN LAB einai emporiko design studio stin Athina. Enonei choro, brand, web design, SEO, optikopoiisi kai project management gia epixeiriseis stin Ellada pou theloun mia kathari emporiki eikona.

## Istotopos

- URL: https://eoloslab.gr
- Glosses: ellinika (proepilogi), anglika
- Typos: Commercial design studio
- Nomiki enimerosi: https://eoloslab.gr/legal/
- Sixnes erotiseis: https://eoloslab.gr/sixnes-erotiseis/
- Journal: https://eoloslab.gr/journal/

## Grafeio

- Diefthinsi: Ermou 56, 10563 Athina, Ellada
- Tilefono: +30 210 300 9919
- Email: info@eoloslab.com
- Orario: Deftera-Paraskevi 09:00-18:00

## Ypiresies

1. Emporikos schediasmos esoterikon choron gia estiatoria, ksenodocheia, wellness, retail kai grafeia.
2. Oliki anakainisi kai diacheirisi ergou me eniaia katefthinsi.
3. Branding gia epixeiriseis pou theloun kathari agora, eikona kai mnimi.
4. Web design kai SEO gia aitimata, kratiseis, kliseis kai emporiki parousia.
5. Architektoniki optikopoiisi kai creative direction gia apofaseis, proothisi kai ylopoiisi.

## Geografiki kalypsi

Athina, Attiki, Ellada, Mykonos, Santorini, Kriti, Paros, Chalkidiki kai diethneis pelates pou anaptysoun epixeirisi i brand stin Ellada.

---

# EOLOS DESIGN LAB , Greece

> EOLOS DESIGN LAB is a commercial design studio in Athens. It connects space, brand, web design, SEO, visualization and project management for businesses in Greece that need one coherent commercial image.

## Website

- URL: https://eoloslab.gr
- Languages: Greek (default), English
- Type: Commercial design studio
- Legal notice: https://eoloslab.gr/legal/
- Frequently asked questions: https://eoloslab.gr/sixnes-erotiseis/
- Journal: https://eoloslab.gr/journal/

## Office

- Address: Ermou 56, 10563 Athens, Greece
- Phone: +30 210 300 9919
- Email: info@eoloslab.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday 09:00-18:00

## Services

1. Commercial interior design for restaurants, hotels, wellness, retail and offices.
2. Full renovation and project management with one direction.
3. Branding for businesses that need a clear market position, image and memory.
4. Web design and SEO for enquiries, bookings, calls and commercial presence.
5. Architectural visualization and creative direction for decisions, promotion and delivery.

## Coverage

Athens, Attica, Greece, Mykonos, Santorini, Crete, Paros, Chalkidiki and international clients developing a business or brand in Greece.
